ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
python_min:
- '3.10'
target_platform:
- linux-64
name: xbbg

raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "xbbg" %}
{% set version = "1.0.0rc2" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/alpha-xone/{{ name }}/archive/v{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 1e2c8b2e082005cc7f2ed3d4c202764093cf802b6c6a39323a3863fc2d4b26af

build:
  number: 0
  skip: true  # [py<310 or (osx and x86_64)]
  script:
    - export PIP_NO_INDEX=false                                                                                                # [unix]
    - set PIP_NO_INDEX=false                                                                                                   # [win]
    # Build with the matrix interpreter so each CI variant emits its own pyXY package.
    - {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install {{ name }}=={{ version }} --no-deps --no-cache-dir --pre --index-url https://pypi.org/simple -vv

requirements:
  host:
    - python
    - pip
  run:
    - python
    - narwhals >=1.30
    - pyarrow >=22.0.0
    - blpapi

test:
  imports:
    - xbbg
  requires:
    - python

about:
  home: https://github.com/alpha-xone/xbbg
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_family: Apache
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: Intuitive Bloomberg data API
  doc_url: https://xbbg.readthedocs.io
  dev_url: https://github.com/alpha-xone/xbbg

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - kj55-dev
    - makoponi
